positive: A stylized, whimsical scene featuring a group of diverse celestial creatures (e.g., tiny griffin, playful nebula cloud, sleepy crescent moon, soaring rainbow butterfly) interacting within a magical forest clearing. The style should be modern flat vector illustration meets ethereal stained glass effect. Strong contrast between dark, silhouetted foliage and brightly glowing, saturated subjects. Composition must be centrally balanced and highly symmetrical for optimal print placement. Use rich jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) offset by pops of iridescent gold and silver. High detail on the creatures' outlines, crisp clean lines, and minimal shading to ensure print scalability and silhouette effectiveness. Whimsical, positive, inviting, cozy feeling. --ar 1:1
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, blurry, out of focus, grainy, noise, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low contrast, photorealistic, cinematic, 3d render, low detail, messy composition
